svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="阶段4全链路+平台化" id="stage4"> <mxGraphModel dx="-544" dy="-232" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1040" pageHeight="820" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=15;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="阶段4：全链路分层 + Nuxt3 + 平台化体系（业务成熟，技术驱动增长）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="700" x="180" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Term" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="终端层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="220" x="360" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Tg" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=4;" value="终端层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="280" x="40" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="T1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="PC端：Vue3 + Element Plus" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="32" width="256" x="52" y="104" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="T2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="移动端：Vue3 + Vant" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="32" width="256" x="52" y="144" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="T3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="小程序：Vue 语法跨端适配" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="32" width="256" x="52" y="184" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="App" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="应用层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="220" x="360" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Ag" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=4;" value="应用层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="280" x="40" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="A1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="业务应用：Vue3 开发" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="32" width="256" x="52" y="284" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="A2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="微前端子应用：Vue3/Nuxt3 + qiankun" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="32" width="256" x="52" y="324" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="A3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="低代码应用：Vue3 可视化引擎" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="32" width="256" x="52" y="364" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Fw" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="框架与中间层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="220" x="360" y="430" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Fg" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eff6ff;strokeColor=#93c5fd;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=4;" value="框架与中间层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="280" x="40" y="430" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="F1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="前端框架：Vue3 + Pinia + Vue Router4" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="32" width="256" x="52" y="464" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="F2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="服务端渲染：Nuxt3（SSR/SSG/ISR）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="32" width="256" x="52" y="504" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="F3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="BFF层：Egg.js（高并发）/ Express（轻量）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="32" width="256" x="52" y="544" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Gw" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="网关层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="220" x="360" y="610" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Gg" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=4;" value="网关层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="280" x="40" y="610" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="G1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="Nginx：负载均衡 + 反向代理" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="32" width="256" x="52" y="644" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="G2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="CDN：静态资源加速" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="32" width="256" x="52" y="684" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="G3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="WAF：网络安全防护" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="32" width="256" x="52" y="724" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Be" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="后端服务层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="220" x="360" y="770" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Bg" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=4;" value="后端服务层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="280" x="40" y="770" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Sup" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f0fdfa;strokeColor=#5eead4;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#134e4a;spacingTop=4;" value="配套支撑体系" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="510" width="320" x="680" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ccfbf1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=10;" value="工程化体系
ESLint + CI/CD + Monorepo" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="280" x="700" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ccfbf1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=10;" value="监控体系
Sentry + Prometheus + ELK" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="280" x="700" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ccfbf1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=10;" value="平台化体系
组件库 + 接口管理 + 配置管理" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="280" x="700" y="410" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Cache" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="Redis 缓存" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="130" x="700" y="610" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Alert" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="告警通知
（邮件/钉钉）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="130" x="850" y="610" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="User" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f0fdfa;strokeColor=#5eead4;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="终端用户" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="160" x="440" y="770" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m1" edge="1" parent="1" source="Term" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="App" value="多端适配"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="600" y="90" /> <mxPoint x="600" y="220" /> <mxPoint x="600" y="270" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m2" edge="1" parent="1" source="App" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="Fw" value="业务承载"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m3" edge="1" parent="1" source="Fw" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="Gw" value="前后端协同"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m4" edge="1" parent="1" source="Gw" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="Be" value="流量管控"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mS" edge="1" parent="1" source="Fw" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#134e4a;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="Sup" value="体系支撑"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="640" y="450" /> <mxPoint x="640" y="325" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mF3C" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" </mxCell> <mxCell id="mS2A" edge="1" parent="1" source="S2" edge="1" parent="1" source="Gw" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="User" value="用户访问"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="470" y="740" /> <mxPoint x="520" y="740" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
